reviews.comment:
Reservé con dias de anticipación un service y cuando llegué no tenían ni un filtro de aceite para mi auto. Una perdida de tiempo, pésima gerencia.

(Translated by Google)
I booked a service appointment days in advance, and when I arrived they didn't even have an oil filter for my car. A waste of time, terrible management.

reviews.comment:
Cargue combustible. Quise abonar con QR de Mercado pago y me dijeron que no podían hacerme factura A debido al método de pago. En ninguna otra estación de servicios me pasó esto.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with fuel. I tried to pay with a Mercado Pago QR code, but they told me they couldn't issue an invoice (type A) because of the payment method. This has never happened to me at any other gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJcW1qZHUxamVEVzV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad que es un desastre la atención y el lugar en si, tanto para combustibles como el full (si es que alguna vez da la casualidad de encontrarlo abierto)

(Translated by Google)
The truth is that the service and the place itself are a disaster, both for fuel and the full service (if you ever happen to find it open).
